channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: The U.S. men's run at the World Cup ends with a 4-1 Round of 16 loss to Belgium
item.description: The team was in the eye of a storm over a controversial phone call from President Trump to FIFA's head about a red card on a U.S. striker. But even with the U.S. at full strength, Belgium easily won.
item.content:encoded:
The team was in the eye of a storm over a controversial phone call from President Trump to FIFA's head about a red card on a U.S. striker. But even with the U.S. at full strength, Belgium easily won.

(Image credit: Alex Grimm)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Extreme heat on Independence Day will be America's new normal, experts say
item.description: In cities across the U.S., parades were canceled and events were delayed because of the heat. Meanwhile, emergency rooms saw a high number of people with heat-related illnesses.
item.content:encoded:
In cities across the U.S., parades were canceled and events were delayed because of the heat. Meanwhile, emergency rooms saw a high number of people with heat-related illnesses.

(Image credit: Amid Farahi)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger

item.title: Supreme Court lets Texas restrict minors' access to app stores for the time being
item.description: Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have their parents' permission to download most apps. The Supreme Court says the law can go into effect as lawsuits continue in lower courts.
item.content:encoded:
Texas' App Store Accountability Act requires minors to have their parents' permission to download most apps. The Supreme Court says the law can go into effect as lawsuits continue in lower courts.

(Image credit: Paul Ellis)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Man sues DHS after agents tracked him down for sending a scathing email to ICE
item.description: Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing.
item.content:encoded:
Federal agents tried to track David Streever to his home and hotel, and left him a warning notice that a critical email he sent the former head of ICE may have been illegal. Now he's suing.

(Image credit: David Streever)
item.dc:creator: Jude Joffe-Block

item.title: Under Trump, spouses of U.S. citizens face policy changes in the immigration system
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.
item.content:encoded:
Spouses of U.S. citizens have traditionally had a special place in immigration law. That's no longer the case, according to the administration and immigration lawyers.

(Image credit: Joseph Prezioso)
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo

item.title: Government launches Trump Accounts, offering $1,000 to eligible babies
item.description: The federal government has launched new tax-deferred investment accounts called Trump Accounts, offering $1,000 of seed money for eligible newborns.
item.content:encoded: The federal government has launched new tax-deferred investment accounts called Trump Accounts, offering $1,000 of seed money for eligible newborns.
item.dc:creator: Hosts

item.title: Officials in Saginaw, Michigan, seek changes to property tax revenues
item.description: Saginaw, Mich. officials are seeking to end a nearly 50-year-old cap on property tax revenues.
item.content:encoded: Saginaw, Mich. officials are seeking to end a nearly 50-year-old cap on property tax revenues.
item.dc:creator: AJ Jones

item.title: Colorado wildfires leave vast trail of destruction
item.description: Fast-growing Colorado wildfires have destroyed hundreds of structures and forced evacuations of entire towns.
item.content:encoded: Fast-growing Colorado wildfires have destroyed hundreds of structures and forced evacuations of entire towns.
item.dc:creator: Sam Brasch

item.title: U.S. striker will play against Belgium at World Cup after Trump red card controversy
item.description: The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in a Round of 16 match after a surprise decision by FIFA to allow him to play despite receiving a red card last week.

(Image credit: Jamie Squire)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: Despite stiff political headwinds, tribe in Colorado brings utility scale solar project online
item.description: President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump has made substantial efforts to curb renewable energy development. The Ute Mountain Ute tribe in Colorado managed to bring a big solar project online anyway.

(Image credit: Roberto Rosales)
item.dc:creator: Adam Burke
